description: Capabilities for Carrier windows. The injected scripts call Carrier's own commands (settings, open-external, copy/download image, notifications, theme, update check); Tauri v2 blocks IPC from remote origins unless they are listed under `remote`. Keep this list minimal: every listed origin's own page scripts (not just ours) can call the allowed commands. meta.com/oculus.com are deliberately absent — they only appear during Meta-account login redirects, where the injected features can fail soft (an external link clicked there won't open until back on Messenger).
